name: LiquidPad
description: Monitor LiquidPad token launches, $LPAD burn cycles, and Liquid Protocol ecosystem activity from Aeon.

skills.description: Track $LPAD buyback & burn cycles. Alert when a new cycle ships.

Notify when a new token launches through LiquidPad and verify on-chain provenance via /api/verify.
Track claimable trading fees on every LiquidPad-launched token. Surface top earners.
